summary: Amber workbook panel used to bridge study content into assignment-ready thinking.
renderingRules: Render on an amber-tinted surface with strong label language.
Use a single focused writing prompt instead of multiple weak prompts.
Keep the checkpoint compact and visibly tied to the lesson above it.
interactionRules: Persist the learner response using the supplied saveKey.
Allow optional successCriteria text to frame what a strong answer includes.
persistenceRules: Checkpoint textareas must survive save, load, and backup export.
constraints: A checkpoint should follow teaching and practice, not precede them.
A checkpoint must not replace the assignment itself.
